name: The Chesapeake Bank & Trust Co.
description_short: Chesapeake Bank & Trust is a locally-headquartered community bank in Kent County, Maryland offering checking, savings, lending, and digital banking services.
description_long:
Chesapeake Bank & Trust Co. operates as a community bank headquartered in Kent County, Maryland, positioning itself as 'The Only Locally Headquartered Bank in Kent County.' The institution has established itself within the regional banking landscape and maintains multiple branch locations including offices on Washington Avenue and Heron Point. According to the bank's current messaging, it claims to be soon the only locally-headquartered bank in the county.

The bank offers traditional banking products and services including checking and savings accounts, online banking with bill pay functionality, Visa debit cards with ATM deposit capabilities, and mobile banking access. They provide lending services, specifically advertising home equity loans as a flexible line of credit product. The bank maintains membership in the Allpoint Network, providing surcharge-free ATM access across their partner network. Personal conveniences include free internet banking and digital payment options.

Chesapeake Bank & Trust emphasizes its local ownership and community focus, contrasting itself with larger national or regional chains. The bank was ranked 19th out of the top 50 high-performing community banks in the Northeast according to Market Intelligence in 2024. They actively promote their commitment to local decision-making by positioning themselves as having 'Local Bankers' who can assist with borrowing and financial decisions.

As a traditional community bank, Chesapeake Bank & Trust serves customers seeking local banking relationships and community-focused financial services. The bank's website emphasizes personal service and local accessibility, with multiple phone lines for different services (410-778-1600 main, 410-778-2181 Washington Avenue, 410-778-1600 Heron Point, 410-778-2265 Tele Banking). However, the website content is primarily promotional and does not provide detailed information about specific rates, fees, minimum balances, or comprehensive product terms. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking and digital account access
Visa debit cards with ATM deposit capability
Home equity loans and lines of credit
pros: Only locally-headquartered bank in Kent County, Maryland, offering local decision-making and community focus
Ranked 19th out of top 50 high-performing community banks in the Northeast per Market Intelligence 2024
Free internet banking and online bill pay included with accounts
Membership in Allpoint Network for surcharge-free ATM access nationwide
Mobile banking and Visa debit cards with ATM deposit capability
Multiple convenient branch locations with dedicated phone lines for different services
Flexible home equity loan products available for qualified borrowers
cons: Website provides no specific information about APRs, interest rates, or account fees
No details on minimum deposit requirements or account balance thresholds
Limited transparency about loan terms, qualification requirements, or product features
Geographically limited to Kent County area with only multiple branch locations mentioned
Website contains minimal product comparison or detailed service descriptions
best_for: Kent County, Maryland residents seeking local banking relationships and community focus
Small business owners and entrepreneurs preferring locally-headquartered financial institutions
Customers wanting personal relationships with local decision-makers at their bank
Homeowners interested in home equity products from a community-oriented lender
diagnosis: Chesapeake Bank & Trust is best for Kent County, Maryland residents and business owners seeking personal, community-focused banking from a locally-headquartered institution rather than a national chain. The primary caveat is the lack of detailed product information, fee structures, and rate transparency on their website—customers must contact the bank directly via phone to obtain specific terms and pricing information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
